glosses.vi: sinh đôi; anh em sinh đôi

translations.es: Ese de allá es mi hermano gemelo.
translations.it: Quello laggiù è il mio fratello gemello.
translations.zh-Hans: 那边那个是我的双胞胎兄弟。
translations.yue: 嗰邊嗰個係我孖生兄弟。
translations.pt: Aquele ali é meu irmão gêmeo.
translations.vi: Người kia là anh em sinh đôi của tôi.
translations.hi: वह वहाँ मेरा जुड़वा भाई है.
translations.el: Εκεί είναι ο δίδυμος αδελφός μου.
translations.id: Itu di sana adalah saudara kembarku.
translations.ja: あそこにいるのが僕の双子の兄弟です。

tokens.explanation: Clitic demonstrative pronoun functioning as the subject before a vowel-initial verb; introduces a copular clause.
3rd person singular present of the copula 'être', linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
1st person singular possessive determiner modifying 'jumeau' (masculine singular).
Masculine singular noun used as the predicate nominal of the copular clause.
Compound spatial adverb giving deictic location for the clause.

translations.en: Your twin is waiting out front.
translations.es: Tu hermano gemelo te espera afuera.
translations.it: Tuo fratello gemello ti aspetta fuori.
translations.ko: 네 쌍둥이 형제가 앞에서 기다리고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的双胞胎兄弟在门口等你。
translations.yue: 你孖生兄弟喺門口等緊你。
translations.ru: Твой брат-близнец ждёт тебя у входа.
translations.pt: Seu irmão gêmeo está te esperando na frente.
translations.vi: Anh em sinh đôi của bạn đang đợi bạn ở phía trước.
translations.ar: أخوك التوأم ينتظرك في الخارج عند المدخل.
translations.nl: Je tweelingbroer wacht voor de ingang.
translations.uk: Твій брат-близнюк чекає тебе перед входом.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा जुड़वा भाई बाहर सामने इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Twój brat bliźniak czeka na ciebie przed wejściem.
translations.el: Ο δίδυμος αδελφός σου σε περιμένει μπροστά.
translations.nb: Tvillingbroren din venter på deg ute foran.
translations.ro: Fratele tău geamăn te așteaptă în față.
translations.cs: Tvůj bratr-dvojče na tebe čeká před vchodem.
translations.da: Din tvillingebror venter på dig ude foran.
translations.ja: あなたの双子の兄弟が外で待っています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular possessive determiner modifying 'jumeau' (masculine singular).
Masculine singular noun serving as the subject of the clause.
Clitic 2nd person singular object pronoun placed before the verb; direct object of 'attend'.
3rd person singular present of 'attendre'; main verb selecting a direct object (the clitic 't''').
Adverb indicating location without a complement.

sentences.target: Nous cherchons mon jumeau au parc.

translations.fr: Nous cherchons mon jumeau au parc.
translations.en: We are looking for my twin at the park.
translations.es: Estamos buscando a mi hermano gemelo en el parque.
translations.de: Wir suchen meinen Zwillingsbruder im Park.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando il mio fratello gemello al parco.
translations.ko: 우리는 공원에서 내 쌍둥이 형제를 찾고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在公园找我的双胞胎兄弟。
translations.yue: 我哋喺公園度搵我個孖生兄弟。
translations.ru: Мы ищем моего брата-близнеца в парке.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando meu irmão gêmeo no parque.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים את אחי התאום בפארק.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm anh em sinh đôi của tôi ở công viên.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن أخي التوأم في الحديقة.
translations.nl: We zoeken mijn tweelingbroer in het park.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо мого брата-близнюка в парку.
translations.hi: हम पार्क में मेरे जुड़वा भाई को ढूंढ रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Szukamy mojego brata bliźniaka w parku.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε τον δίδυμο αδελφό μου στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter tvillingbroren min i parken.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari saudara kembarku di taman.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter min tvillingbror i parken.
translations.ro: Îl căutăm pe fratele meu geamăn în parc.
translations.da: Vi leder efter min tvillingebror i parken.
translations.ja: 私たちは公園で私の双子の兄弟を探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun functioning as the subject.
1st person plural present; main verb meaning 'to look for'.
1st person singular possessive determiner modifying 'jumeau'.
Masculine singular noun serving as the direct object of 'cherchons'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with the definite article 'le'; introduces the locative PP.
Noun complement of the preposition 'au', specifying the place.

translations.en: She wants to introduce her twin.
translations.es: Ella quiere presentar a su hermano gemelo.
translations.it: Lei vuole presentare suo fratello gemello.
translations.ko: 그녀는 자신의 쌍둥이 형제를 소개하고 싶어 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她想介绍她的双胞胎兄弟。
translations.yue: 佢想介紹佢個孖生兄弟。
translations.pt: Ela quer apresentar seu irmão gêmeo.
translations.he: היא רוצה להציג את אחיה התאום.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn giới thiệu anh em sinh đôi của mình.
translations.ar: هي تريد أن تقدم أخاها التوأم.
translations.hi: वह अपने जुड़वा भाई का परिचय कराना चाहती है.
translations.pl: Ona chce przedstawić swojego brata bliźniaka.
translations.el: Θέλει να συστήσει τον δίδυμο αδελφό της.
translations.ro: Ea vrea să-și prezinte fratele geamăn.
translations.ja: 彼女は自分の双子の兄弟を紹介したいです。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine personal pronoun functioning as the subject.
3rd person singular present of 'vouloir'; main verb of volition taking an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement (xcomp) of 'veut'.
3rd person singular possessive determiner modifying 'jumeau' (masculine singular).
Masculine singular noun serving as the direct object of 'présenter'.
